# terrible_cisco_intersight_intersight_vnic_template (Resource)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this task against
- `name` (String) The name assigned to the vNIC Template. Must be unique within the organization. The name must be between 1 and 62 alphanumeric characters, allowing special characters :-_.

### Optional

- `async_seconds` (Number) Run the task asynchronously, timing out after this many seconds. 0 = synchronous (default).
- `cdn_source` (String) Source of the CDN. It can either be user specified or be the same as the vNIC name.
- `cdn_value` (String) CDN value when cdn_source is 'user'.
- `changed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered changed (e.g. 'false').
- `connection_type` (String) Type of connection for the vNIC.
- `delegate_to_id` (String) ID of another terrible_host to delegate execution to.
- `description` (String) The user-defined description for the vNIC Template. Description can contain letters(a-z, A-Z), numbers(0-9), hyphen(-), period(.), colon(:), or an underscore(_).
- `enable_override` (Boolean) When enabled, the configuration of the derived instances may override the template configuration.
- `environment` (String) Environment variables set for the task (dict of name→value).
- `eth_adapter_policy_name` (String) Relationship to the Ethernet Adapter Policy. Required when state is 'present'.
- `eth_qos_policy_name` (String) Relationship to the Ethernet QoS Policy. Required when state is 'present'.
- `fabric_eth_network_control_policy_name` (String) Relationship to the Fabric Ethernet Network Control Policy. Required when state is 'present'.
- `fabric_eth_network_group_policy_name` (String) Relationship to the Fabric Ethernet Group Policy. Required when state is 'present'.
- `failed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered failed.
- `failover_enabled` (Boolean) Enables automatic vNIC failover to the secondary Fabric Interconnect if the primary path fails. Failover applies only to Cisco VICs that are connected to a Fabric Interconnect cluster.
- `ignore_errors` (Boolean) When true, a failed task does not raise a Terraform error.
- `iscsi_boot_policy_name` (String) Relationship to the boot iSCSI Policy.
- `mac_pool_name` (String) The MAC pool that is assigned to the vNIC Template. Required when state is 'present'.
- `organization` (String) The name of the Organization this resource is assigned to. Policies created within a Custom Organization are applicable only to devices in the same Organization. Use 'default' for the default organization.
- `pin_group_name` (String) Pingroup name associated to vNIC for static pinning. LCP deploy will resolve pingroup name and fetches the corresponding uplink port/port channel to pin the vNIC traffic.
- `poll_interval` (Number) Polling interval in seconds when async_seconds > 0. Defaults to 15.
- `skip_tags` (String) Skip tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `sriov_settings` (String) SR-IOV settings when connection_type is 'sriov'.
- `state` (String) If `present`, will verify the resource is present and will create if needed. If `absent`, will verify the resource is absent and will delete if needed.
- `switch_id` (String) The fabric port to which the vNIC will be associated.
- `tags` (String) Run only tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `timeout` (Number) Override the default execution timeout (seconds). Defaults to 300.
- `triggers` (String) Arbitrary map of values; any change triggers task re-execution
- `usnic_settings` (String) USNIC settings when connection_type is 'usnic'. Required when connection_type is 'usnic'.
- `vmq_settings` (String) VMQ settings when connection_type is 'vmq'.

### Read-Only

- `api_response` (String) The API response output returned by the specified resource.
- `changed` (Boolean) Whether the task reported a change
- `id` (String) Unique task resource ID
